name: KohakuTerrarium
desc: KohakuTerrarium is a general-purpose AI agent framework and batteries-included app for building, running, and composing self-contained agents and multi-agent t…
descFull: KohakuTerrarium is a general-purpose AI agent framework and batteries-included app for building, running, and composing self-contained agents and multi-agent teams, with built-in tools, sub-agents, persistent sessions, TUI, and web UI.
